rationale: The cited paper is used for a specific interpretive role, not just as a background list citation. In the results and discussion, the citing paper invokes Anderson and Simester (2013) to explain and contextualize observed positive cross-store spillovers (e.g., reminder effects where promotions at one chain can raise brand purchases at other chains). This prior evidence helps the authors make sense of category-specific findings, especially for chips, and supports their mechanism-level interpretation.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Anderson and Simester (2013) as evidence that competitive advertising/promotions can generate positive spillovers across retailers. It uses that finding to interpret its own simulation results on cross-store brand spillovers under different promotion calendars.
